title: iPhone 15 Pro — 256GB Space Black
description: iPhone 15 Pro in perfect condition. 256GB storage, Space Black finish, comes with original box, charger, and unused EarPods. Battery health at 98%. No scratches or dents. Selling because I upgraded to 15 Pro Max.

title: Senior Frontend Developer — Remote
description: We are looking for a senior frontend developer with 5+ years of Angular or React experience. You will lead a team of 3 developers building our customer-facing SaaS platform. Competitive salary, flexible hours, full remote, equity options included.

title: Solid Oak Dining Table with 6 Chairs
description: Beautiful solid oak dining table (200cm × 90cm) with 6 matching upholstered chairs. Light natural finish, minor surface scratches only. Selling due to move. Original price $2,400 — now offered at a fraction of that. Must collect.

title: Professional House Cleaning Service
description: Licensed and insured cleaning service for homes and apartments. We use eco-friendly products. Services include deep cleaning, regular maintenance, move-in/out cleaning. 5-star rated on Google with 200+ reviews. Free quote on request.

title: Studio Apartment — Utilities Included
description: Cozy studio apartment perfect for a single professional or student. All utilities included in rent (water, electricity, internet). Furnished with bed, desk, and wardrobe. Building has gym and rooftop access.

title: Sony PlayStation 5 + 3 Games
description: PlayStation 5 disc edition in great condition. Includes 3 games: Spider-Man 2, God of War Ragnarök, and Horizon Forbidden West. All cables and controllers included. Selling because switching to PC gaming.

title: Freelance Graphic Designer Available
description: Experienced graphic designer available for freelance projects. Specialties: branding, logo design, social media graphics, and UI/UX mockups. Portfolio available on request. Fast turnaround and competitive rates.

title: 2022 Trek Marlin 7 Mountain Bike
description: 2022 Trek Marlin 7 in excellent condition, size L. Hydraulic disc brakes, 1×12 drivetrain, RockShox fork. Serviced last month, new brake pads. Only 600km ridden. Includes lock, pump, and helmet.

title: Part-Time Barista — Coffee Shop
description: Local coffee shop looking for an enthusiastic part-time barista. 20-25 hours per week, flexible schedule including weekends. No experience required — we train. Great team atmosphere, tips included, staff discount on all drinks.

title: IKEA KALLAX Shelf Unit — White
description: IKEA KALLAX 4×2 shelf unit in white. Perfect for books, decor, or vinyl records. Good condition with minor scuffs on one side. Dimensions: 147cm × 77cm. Comes disassembled. You pick up only.

title: Test Bike for Sale
description: A great mountain bike in excellent condition, barely used.
